basic_details.job_title: BIRAC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Officer, Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC) Officer, Manager and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC). A total of 15 vacancies have been announced through the BIRAC Recruitment 2026 for various posts including Manager (Regulatory Affairs), Manager (Research Analysis), Sr. Program Officer, Program Officer, Project Management Analyst, Finance Officer, Administrative Assistant, Officer (Legal), Young Professional, and Associate Consultant - Clean Energy.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Pharma/Management/Health Innovation/Public Policy, Ph.D in Life Sciences or allied areas, B.Tech/M.Sc/Post Graduate in relevant fields
qualification.details: Manager (Regulatory Affairs): Masters in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Pharma/Management/Health Innovation/Public Policy or any other related area. Desirable: Ph.D in one of the above mentioned area. Manager (Research Analysis): Masters in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Pharma/Management/Health Innovation/Public Policy or any other related area. Desirable: Ph.D in one of the above mentioned area. Sr. Program Officer: Masters from a recognized institute in Life Sciences/Pharma/Bio-medical sciences/Public Policy/Public Health. Desirable: PhD in Lifesciences/other allied sciences domain. Program Officer: Masters in biological sciences/allied areas/Public Policy/Policy Administration. Desirable: PhD in translational research of industrial application. Project Management Analyst: B. Tech/M.Sc in life sciences/biotechnology or Post Graduate in Commerce/statistics/Public policy with a Diploma/PG Diploma in relevant analytical area. Finance Officer: M. Com/MBA (Finance) from a recognized and reputed institute. Desirable: Chartered Accountant. Administrative Assistant: Graduate in any discipline from recognized University/Institute. Desirable: Diploma/PG Diploma in Office Management/Communications/Public Relations or related subjects. Officer (Legal): Post Graduate in Science with LLB from a recognized institution/ACS/FCS from ICSI. Young Professional: B.Com/B.E/B.Tech/Post-graduate in Life Sciences/Biotechnology. Associate Consultant - Clean Energy: PhD in environmental science/biochemical engineering/Chemical engineering/Life Sciences/Biotechnology or related disciplines from a recognized institute.

selection_process: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for detailed information on the selection procedure.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BIRAC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.biotechnology_industry_research_assistan: Masters in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Pharma/Management/Health Innovation/Public Policy, Ph.D in Life Sciences or allied areas, B.Tech/M.Sc/Post Graduate in relevant fields

content_sections.heading: BIRAC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the BIRAC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download BIRAC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BIRAC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Manager (Regulatory Affairs): Masters in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Pharma/Management/Health Innovation/Public Policy or any other related area. Desirable: Ph.D in one of the above mentioned area. Manager (Research Analysis): Masters in Life Sciences/Biotechnology/Pharma/Management/Health Innovation/Public Policy or any other related area. Desirable: Ph.D in one of the above mentioned area. Sr. Program Officer: Masters from a recognized institute in Life Sciences/Pharma/Bio-medical sciences/Public Policy/Public Health. Desirable: PhD in Lifesciences/other allied sciences domain. Program Officer: Masters in biological sciences/allied areas/Public Policy/Policy Administration. Desirable: PhD in translational research of industrial application. Project Management Analyst: B. Tech/M.Sc in life sciences/biotechnology or Post Graduate in Commerce/statistics/Public policy with a Diploma/PG Diploma in relevant analytical area. Finance Officer: M. Com/MBA (Finance) from a recognized and reputed institute. Desirable: Chartered Accountant. Administrative Assistant: Graduate in any discipline from recognized University/Institute. Desirable: Diploma/PG Diploma in Office Management/Communications/Public Relations or related subjects. Officer (Legal): Post Graduate in Science with LLB from a recognized institution/ACS/FCS from ICSI. Young Professional: B.Com/B.E/B.Tech/Post-graduate in Life Sciences/Biotechnology. Associate Consultant - Clean Energy: PhD in environmental science/biochemical engineering/Chemical engineering/Life Sciences/Biotechnology or related disciplines from a recognized institute.

content_sections.heading: BIRAC Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for detailed information on the selection procedure.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BIRAC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BIRAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BIRAC recruitment drive is 12th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this BIRAC recruitment?
faq.answer: Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC) has announced a total of 15 vacancies for various posts in this recruitment drive. These positions are spread across different departments and levels.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for BIRAC jobs?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post. Generally, candidates need a Masters degree in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Pharma, Management, Health Innovation, Public Policy, or related fields. Some positions require a Ph.D. or B.Tech/M.Sc.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for BIRAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All eligible candidates must apply for the BIRAC Recruitment 2026 through the online mode. The application link will be available on the official website of BIRAC during the application period.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for BIRAC jobs?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no mention of any application fee for this recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates or specific instructions regarding fees.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the positions advertised by BIRAC?
faq.answer: The positions advertised by the Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC) are on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for BIRAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the BIRAC Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary range for the posts in BIRAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will vary depending on the post. The salary ranges from Rs. 38,500/- to Rs. 2,70,000/- per month, as specified for each position in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from any state apply for these government jobs?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state in India can apply for these positions as long as they meet the eligibility criteria. The job location is mentioned as New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for BIRAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The specific details of the selection process are not provided in the extracted data. Candidates are strongly encouraged to refer to the official BIRAC notification for comprehensive information on the selection methodology.
